name: nmap
title: nmap
summary: nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner
description:
The Network Mapper
Nmap is a utility for network exploration or security auditing. It
supports ping scanning (determine which hosts are up), many port
scanning techniques, version detection (determine service protocols
and application versions listening behind ports), and TCP/IP
fingerprinting (remote host OS or device identification). Nmap also
offers flexible target and port specification, decoy/stealth scanning,
sunRPC scanning, and more. Most Unix and Windows platforms are
supported in both GUI and commandline modes. Several popular handheld
devices are also supported, including the Sharp Zaurus and the iPAQ.

commands.name: nping
commands.description: Network packet generation tool / ping utility

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nmap because nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nmap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nmap [Scan Type...] [Options] {target specification}` as documented upstream for nmap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nmap -v scanme.nmap.org` as documented upstream for nmap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nmap -sS -O scanme.nmap.org/24` as documented upstream for nmap.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nmap -sV -p 22,53,110,143,4564 198.116.0-255.1-127` as documented upstream for nmap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nmap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nmap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install nmap. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `nmap [Scan Type...] [Options] {target specification}`. Further invocations from upstream: `nmap -v scanme.nmap.org`; `nmap -sS -O scanme.nmap.org/24`. nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: nmap - Network exploration tool and security / port scanner.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install nmap
Install with: sudo apt install nmap
